title: Oman Maritime Security Centre: suspected floating mine in Strait of Hormuz — warns mariners in Omani territorial waters
snippet: Oman's Maritime Security Centre issued alert on Saturday (May 31) after floating object suspected to be a mine sighted west of Inshore Traffic Zone in Strait of Hormuz within Omani territorial waters. Centre urged all seafarers/fishermen/vessels to exercise utmost caution. Advises maintaining safe distance from suspicious objects, immediately report to authorities. Unclear if object recovered.
